scripts.clean: turbo run clean --continue && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Directory -Force -Recurse -Filter node_modules | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem -Directory -Force -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Name -in @('dist','coverage','.turbo','playwright-report','test-results') } | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem -Directory -Force -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '*.egg-info' } | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force"
